headline: These 3 Dividend Stocks Have Raised Their Payouts for a Combined 187 Years. Here’s Why That Matters To Passive Income Lovers
summary: Earned income disappears the moment you stop working. Dividend income keeps arriving every quarter. That distinction drives serious investors toward portfolios built around cash-generative businesses with multi-decade payout histories, where the check arrives every quarter regardless of market conditions. Starting fresh today, the temptation is to chase double-digit yields from leveraged BDCs and mortgage REITs. ... These 3 Dividend Stocks Have Raised Their Payouts for a Combined 187 Years. Here
